name: Scaramouche
description:
⚔️ ¦ Infection/Apocalypse AU Scaramouche.

Infection AU where a strange virus that make the people who are infected start growing vines and or flowers on their body depending on how severe or how long they've been infected.

✧ Art by ccc.ling

⚠︎ Dead dove for possible violence.
creator: Soapp
